_comment: Build-out A2.1 schema demonstrator. This file is NOT loaded by run_eval.py (the loader globs only case_*.json), so it never affects the regression gate. It shows the golden-case shape for whoever grows the real, clinician-labeled golden set under evals/golden_set/ (gitignored — never commit real PHI). Each entry below is fully synthetic (Synthea-style), HIPAA Safe-Harbor clean, and demonstrates one HCC bucket. expected_codes = codes a careful clinician would surface; must_abstain_codes = codes the agent must NOT surface for this encounter.

encounters.note: 58-year-old female with type 2 diabetes mellitus and diabetic peripheral neuropathy. Reports bilateral foot tingling; monofilament exam abnormal. A1c 8.9%. Continue metformin, add gabapentin for neuropathic pain.

72-year-old male with chronic systolic congestive heart failure, EF 30% on recent echo. NYHA class III. On carvedilol, lisinopril, furosemide. Presents for routine follow-up; mild ankle edema, no acute decompensation.

65-year-old former smoker with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, presenting with acute exacerbation: increased dyspnea, purulent sputum. Started on prednisone burst and azithromycin. No respiratory failure; SpO2 93% on room air.

70-year-old male with chronic kidney disease stage 4, eGFR 24, secondary to hypertensive nephrosclerosis. Anemia of CKD with Hgb 10.1. Counseled on dialysis planning and dietary phosphate restriction.

61-year-old female admitted for sepsis secondary to E. coli urinary tract infection, now resolving on day 4 of IV ceftriaxone. Hemodynamically stable, lactate normalized, afebrile for 48 hours. Transitioning to oral antibiotics.
